en.name: Baseball cap (Boston)
en.description: A denim cap perfect for those who want to show some style. Must only be worn with the brim facing backward - rules of the Arena.

en.name: Baseball cap (MultiCam Black)
en.description: A baseball cap in a MultiCam Black camouflage, worn only with the brim facing backward. Ignore and Override.

en.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (OD Green)
en.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision. OD Green version.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Crye Precision AirFrame OD Green Standart

en.name: Atlant Armour Titan Aramid helmet (MultiCam)
en.description: The Titan Aramid ballistic helmet in the form factor copying the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet. Made entirely of aramid, providing an optimal balance between protection and mobility. Equipped with accessory rails and a mount for additional devices. Manufactured by Atlant Armour. MultiCam version.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Atlant Armour Titan Aramid Multicam Standard

en.name: Atlant Armour Titan Aramid helmet (OD Green)
en.description: The Titan Aramid ballistic helmet in the form factor copying the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet. Made entirely of aramid, providing an optimal balance between protection and mobility. Equipped with accessory rails and a mount for additional devices. Manufactured by Atlant Armour. OD Green version.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Atlant Armour Titan Aramid OD Green Standard

en.name: Team Wendy EXFIL Ballistic Helmet (MultiCam)
en.description: One of the most recent tactical ballistic helmets with extensive customization capabilities. The EXFIL LTP (Lightweight, Tactical, Polymer) bump helmet provides impact protection for maritime environments and a stable, comfortable platform for mounting night vision and other accessories. The built-in NVG shroud utilizes an integrated Wilcox machined aluminum shroud insert. MultiCam version.

en.name: Baseball cap (Zaebtsa Flecktarn)
en.description: A baseball cap in a Flecktarn camouflage. For those who always wanna look "supreme".

en.name: Atlant Armour Titan Aramid helmet (Rudiarius)
en.description: The Titan Aramid ballistic helmet in the form factor copied from the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet. Manufactured by Atlant Armour. The decorations and additional protection were firmly attached by Champion JP, a well-known enthusiast of aggressive close-quarters combat.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Atlant Armour Titan Aramid Champion Standard

en.name: Crye Precision AirFrame M-LOK helmet (Bull)
en.description: A Crye Precision AirFrame ballistic helmet fitted with M-LOK accessory rails. This configuration is most commonly seen among fans of JP, one of the Arena Champions. Rumor has it that this is the exact type of helmet he once tossed into the air and shot with his final round when he first became champion.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Crye Precision AirFrame M-LOK Coyote SOF Standart

en.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Old School)
en.description: A Crye Precision AirFrame ballistic helmet without accessory rails. When JP was brought into the cleanup crew on Tagilla’s recommendation, this became his first trophy, taken from one of the Arena fighters.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Crye Precision AirFrame Oldschool Standart

en.name: Baseball cap (Zaebtsa Berezka)
en.description: A baseball cap in a KLMK Winter camouflage. For those who always wanna look "supreme".

en.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Mesh Green)
en.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision.

en.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Shark)
en.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision. The added eye stickers complete the Shark look when combined with the painted chops.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Crye Precision AirFrame Shark Standart

en.name: Crye Precision AirFrame M-LOK helmet (Black)
en.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Equipped with M-LOK rails. Manufactured by Crye Precision. Black version.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet Crye Precision AirFrame M-LOK Black Standart

en.name: HighCom Striker ACHHC IIIA helmet (Coyote Brown)
en.description: A combat helmet manufactured by HighCom, the High Cut version. Does not feature any additional mounts. Coyote Brown version.

weaponPresets._name: Helmet HighCom Striker ACHHC IIIA Coyote Brown Standart

en.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Tan)
en.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision.
